posts.text: Afroman just WON his lawsuit against the police #lawtok #afroman #tiktoklearningcampaign #learnontiktok #news

In this super tragic case, high schoolers tried to TP their teacher’s house in an apparent school tradition. Their teacher, Jason Hughes, was hit by one of their trucks in the aftermath, and later passed away at the hospital.  What happened next, legally speaking? What were the charges, and did they stick?  #lawtok #tiktoklearningcampaign #learnontiktok #headlines #news
New housing bill from the Senate that everyone seems to…like? #lawtok #learnontiktok #tiktoklearningcampaign #politics #house
What happens if your neighbor just…destroys your trees? #lawtok #redditstories #learnontiktok #tiktoklearningcampaign

A new wave of lawsuits is claiming that social media is illegally addicting for teen users. But this isn’t the first time social media companies have been sued for “causing harm” to its users. What’s the diffference here? #lawtok #headlines #news #socialmedia
How would the law answer the infamous trolley problem? #history #lawtok #tiktoklearningcampaign #trolleyproblem

How can a parent be found guilty of their child’s crimes? In this case out of Georgia, Colin Gray, the father of accused school shooter Colt Gray, was just found guilty of murder. The prosecution alleged that it’s because he ignored major warning signs, making him at least partially responsible for what happened. The jury agreed. #lawtok #headlines #georgia #news #explainer
TX law now says that drunk drivers have to pay child support? #lawtok #texas #LearnOnTikTok #headlines #tiktoklearningcampaign
Can Trump do these strikes in Iran without congressional approval? #lawtok #learnontiktok #tiktoklearningcampaign #trump #headlines

This man was found legally liable for the death of his girlfriend, after he “left her to freeze to death” on a dangerous mountain climb #lawtok #mountainclimbingdeere #learnontiktok #tiktoklearningcampaign
